CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Prove-Up Hearing On Petition For Application For Default Court Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants I.M.A. Investment Development, Inc., Jeffery Windham and Aneth Windham.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Michael Indrajana, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Willy Choi, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendants I.M.A. Investment Development, Inc., Jeffery Windham or Aneth Windham.
Defaults were entered against defendants I.M.A Investment Development, Inc. and Jeffery Windham on September 19, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant Aneth Windham on October 25, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 21, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Willy Choi, and against the Defaulted Defendants I.M.A. Investment Development, Inc., Jeffery Windham and Aneth Windham, as follows:

Damages - $160,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,493.15.
Costs - $1,050.00.
Total - $173,543.15.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
